description: Rate assumptions for monthly ROI calculation. Dubai/UK/US market rates only. Never Indian pricing.

rate_context.conservative: Dubai/UK mid-market consultant, $150/hr - typical rate for solo operator or small agency
rate_context.realistic: Senior Dubai consultant or London/NYC specialist, $350/hr - standard for strategy/AI work
rate_context.high_end: Big 4 / McKinsey / BCG tier Dubai/UK/US, $750/hr - partner-grade engagements

hours_multipliers.comment: Realistic human-equivalent hours per artifact. Each artifact represents concrete output that would require a consultant/specialist that much time to produce at comparable quality. Session overhead is separate - base thinking/research time per session beyond the artifacts.
hours_multipliers._explanation: Per-artifact hours reflect what a senior specialist would need to produce comparable quality. PDFs/DOCX = multi-page structured reports. PPTX = designed decks. MD averaged low because many are short notes (high-signal ones offset low). Tools range by complexity: prompts (4h) < scripts (5h) < knowledge files (6h) < skills (8h) < MCP (10h) < global agents (12h) < project agents (20h) < full projects (25h). Session base overhead covers thinking/research time beyond the artifacts.
hours_multipliers._note_on_double_counting: Some overlap is unavoidable - a session that produced 1 PDF likely also created 3-5 MD drafts that went INTO the PDF. We accept modest over-count rather than the heavy under-count of 'sessions only'. The disclaimer makes this transparent to the client.

notes: Conservative = junior freelancer. Realistic = senior consultant. High-end = Big 4 / McKinsey tier. Hours are estimates based on industry averages for comparable quality work.
